summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GameCraft EDU Phase 1 implementation. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend core functionality operational, auth flows working but session persistence has issues.

ui_bugs.issue: JWT token not persisting properly between browser sessions/navigation

passed_tests: Backend API health check - all endpoints responding
User registration flow - creates account and logs in
Dashboard loads with user data and game stats
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Studio page loads and displays existing games
Studio New page loads with game creation form
Landing page displays correctly with all sections
Backend CRUD operations for games working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT token persistence issue - tokens are not being stored/retrieved properly from browser storage, causing users to be logged out when navigating between pages or refreshing

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 9 API endpoints tested and working
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality working, auth persistence needs fix
